brand_name: LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE
investigation_summary: Lowest flagged severity in Volume 1: Good On You fashion subsidiaries still weak transparency; 2023 Paris preliminary probe into far-right-linked security vendor (surveillance of journalists/activists — ongoing). Exotic-skin welfare debates. CDP B; luxury slow-model lower volume than fast fashion.

profile.parent: LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE (EPA: MC)
profile.tax_summary: ~25% French corporate effective in analyst summaries; Netherlands IP conduit reported. Arnault Belgian citizenship bid 2012 — withdrawn/denied press cycle — reputational tax chatter only.
profile.legal_summary: Aggressive anti-counterfeit enforcement — legitimate IP defense. Tiffany deal arbitration 2020 settled. 2023 media: prosecutor review of Sved security firm ties — not final conviction in dossier timing.
profile.labor_summary: Good On You low grades for many maisons — transparency not conditions scandal. Sephora Denver union 2023 first. Craft jobs in France substantial.
profile.environmental_summary: LIFE 360 program; exotic leathers; structural lower throughput vs fast fashion. CDP B (2023).
profile.political_summary: Arnault relational influence vs low disclosed lobbying Euros.
profile.product_health: Perfume ingredient opacity; alcohol standard health externalities.
profile.executive_summary: Bernard Arnault family control; art patronage; no bribery conviction captured here.
